title: Night Cafe & Ferrets GUI
description: Brown & Green GUI Inspired by Ferret Walker's Streaming Overlays, By Yacu
body:
This Resourcepack is themed around Ferret Walker's Vtuber Overlays and Cute Ferrets, With a warm brown color pallete with green highlights, and inspired in a Night Cafe, 

It has differently themed GUI interfaces for some blocks and even some entities like the Villager,

It has coffee beans arranged in the borders of the Inventory GUI which stand out, and even two cute animated Ferrets in both the Survival & Creative Inventories
Every interface has a epilepsy awareness ribbon on the top left corner
